SEARCH
Module com.videolibrary
Package com.videolibrary.rmi

Interface VlsService

All Superinterfaces:
Remote
All Known Implementing Classes:
VlsServiceImpl
public interface VlsService extends Remote
The remote interface for the Video Library System. This interface defines all the callable database operations that the Admin and Customer clients can request from the central RMI Server. * @author Trip
Version:
1.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Movie>
    getBorrowedMovies(String customerName)
    Retrieves a list of movies currently borrowed (and not yet returned) by a customer.
    List<String>
    getCustomers()
    Retrieves a list of all active registered customers from the database.
    List<String>
    getGenres()
    Retrieves a list of all active genres from the database.
    List<Movie>
    getMoviesByGenre(String genre)
    Retrieves a list of all active movies belonging to a specific genre.
    List<Movie>
    getReturnedMovies(String customerName)
    Retrieves a list of movies that a customer has previously borrowed and successfully returned.
    boolean
    registerCustomer(String name, String phone, String email)
    Registers a new customer into the database.
    boolean
    registerGenre(String genreName)
    Registers a new genre into the database.
    boolean
    registerMovie(String title, String genre)
    Registers a new movie into the database under a specific genre.
    boolean
    removeGenre(String genreName)
    Performs a soft delete to remove a genre from active listings.
    boolean
    removeMovie(int movieId)
    Performs a soft delete to remove a movie from active listings.
    boolean
    rentMovie(String customerName, int movieId)
    Assigns a movie rental to a specific customer.
    boolean
    returnMovie(String customerName, int movieId)
    Processes the return of a previously rented movie.

  • Method Details

    • registerGenre

      boolean registerGenre(String genreName) throws RemoteException
      Registers a new genre into the database. * @param genreName The name of the genre to be added.
      Returns:
      true if the genre was successfully saved, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • registerMovie

      boolean registerMovie(String title, String genre) throws RemoteException
      Registers a new movie into the database under a specific genre. * @param title The title of the movie.
      Parameters:
      genre - The genre category for the movie.
      Returns:
      true if the movie was successfully saved, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • registerCustomer

      boolean registerCustomer(String name, String phone, String email) throws RemoteException
      Registers a new customer into the database. * @param name The full name of the customer.
      Parameters:
      phone - The contact phone number of the customer.
      email - The contact email address of the customer.
      Returns:
      true if the customer was successfully saved, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • getGenres

      List<String> getGenres() throws RemoteException
      Retrieves a list of all active genres from the database. * @return A List of strings representing genre names.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • getMoviesByGenre

      List<Movie> getMoviesByGenre(String genre) throws RemoteException
      Retrieves a list of all active movies belonging to a specific genre. * @param genre The name of the genre to filter by.
      Returns:
      A List of Movie objects matching the specified genre.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • getCustomers

      List<String> getCustomers() throws RemoteException
      Retrieves a list of all active registered customers from the database. * @return A List of strings representing customer names.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • rentMovie

      boolean rentMovie(String customerName, int movieId) throws RemoteException
      Assigns a movie rental to a specific customer. * @param customerName The name of the customer renting the movie.
      Parameters:
      movieId - The unique ID of the movie being rented.
      Returns:
      true if the rental was successfully recorded, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • returnMovie

      boolean returnMovie(String customerName, int movieId) throws RemoteException
      Processes the return of a previously rented movie. * @param customerName The name of the customer returning the movie.
      Parameters:
      movieId - The unique ID of the movie being returned.
      Returns:
      true if the return was successfully updated, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • getBorrowedMovies

      List<Movie> getBorrowedMovies(String customerName) throws RemoteException
      Retrieves a list of movies currently borrowed (and not yet returned) by a customer. * @param customerName The name of the customer to look up.
      Returns:
      A List of Movie objects currently in the customer's possession.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • getReturnedMovies

      List<Movie> getReturnedMovies(String customerName) throws RemoteException
      Retrieves a list of movies that a customer has previously borrowed and successfully returned. * @param customerName The name of the customer to look up.
      Returns:
      A List of Movie objects returned by the customer.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • removeGenre

      boolean removeGenre(String genreName) throws RemoteException
      Performs a soft delete to remove a genre from active listings. * @param genreName The name of the genre to deactivate.
      Returns:
      true if the genre was successfully deactivated, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • removeMovie

      boolean removeMovie(int movieId) throws RemoteException
      Performs a soft delete to remove a movie from active listings. * @param movieId The unique ID of the movie to deactivate.
      Returns:
      true if the movie was successfully deactivated, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.
